name: compliance closed-loop validation verifies the audit log entry hash is included in the merkle checkpoint
command: mkdir -p compliance/audit-checkpoints && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-validate.sh" --synthetic-framework test-fw --checkpoint-dir compliance/audit-checkpoints 2>out.txt && [ -f compliance/audit-checkpoints/checkpoint-1.json ] && grep -q '"merkle_root"' compliance/audit-checkpoints/checkpoint-1.json && grep -q 'verify=checkpoint_merkle_includes_entry' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
